title: Controller Witness
description: An attestation by a trusted third party that witnessed that a key was authorized at a specific point in time with a specific verification method

@context.description: Optional JSON-LD context URI for semantic processing.

attester.title: Attester ID
attester.description: DID or address of the witness server that observed the controller assertion.

subject.title: Authorizer ID
subject.description: ID of the entity or service that is authorizing the key.

controller.title: Key ID
controller.description: ID of the key being authorized (e.g., did:pkh, did:jwk, or did:key). Most blockchain wallets use did:pkh.

method.title: Verification Method
method.description: How the witness verified the key's relationship to the service.

x-oma3-enum-descriptions.dns-txt: Key ID was found in a DNS TXT record (e.g., _controllers.example.com)
x-oma3-enum-descriptions.social-profile: Key ID was found in a social media profile (bio, pinned post, etc.)
x-oma3-enum-descriptions.manual: Relationship verified manually using a custom mechanism

observedAt.title: Observed At
observedAt.description: When the witness observed the verification. This is the witness's local observation time, not the blockchain block timestamp.
